claim: Evidence verification confirms that explorer and cross-checker claims are accurate, all evidence paths are valid and accessible, and the gathered evidence fully supports PRD readiness with acceptance criteria satisfied.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES set confirmed with exactly four scopes: project, external, user, unknown
evidence.why: Foundational scope definition validates both agent evidence records.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors() function iterates evidence array and validates scope field presence
evidence.why: Runtime validation logic confirms scope enforcement is implemented.

evidence.summary: Agent prompt explicitly requires WebFetch/WebSearch usage with scope=external marking and tool-profile-specific instructions
evidence.why: Confirms external research tool permissions and scope marking requirements are in agent instructions.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() implements multi-layer automatic scope detection with explicit scope, URL, source type, and path fallback logic
evidence.why: Automatic scope classification prevents external evidence from being misclassified as project-scoped.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasDeclaredScope() and evidenceRecordHasProjectLocator() validate evidence record completeness
evidence.why: Validation functions ensure project evidence requires concrete file locators.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() returns blockers when project facts lack project-scoped evidence or path locators
evidence.why: Blocking logic prevents external evidence from satisfying existing-project fact requirements.

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult() applies EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker when evidenceScopeErrors() returns issues
evidence.why: Runtime enforcement confirms scope validation happens during agent result normalization.

evidence.summary: Doctrine explicitly states external evidence from WebFetch/WebSearch can only serve as background research, not proof of project implementation facts
evidence.why: Product-level documentation confirms external evidence cannot substitute for project evidence.

evidence.summary: Test case removes scope field from evidence and verifies EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker is applied during normalization
evidence.why: Test confirms scope enforcement is actually working at runtime.

evidence.summary: Test case verifies research profile sets agent_tool_profile to research and keeps Claude tools unrestricted without --allowedTools restrictions
evidence.why: Test validates research tool profile enables external tools while maintaining boundary control.

risks: If external research tools are incorrectly used to fetch project-local files through file:// URLs or localhost endpoints, automatic scope detection could misclassify project content as external.
Agent effectiveness depends on provider compliance with scope marking instructions; non-compliant providers could bypass external/project separation before validation catches it.

result.notes: All evidence paths verified and accessible. Explorer and cross-checker claims agree with no conflicts. All three parts of acceptance criteria satisfied: WebFetch/WebSearch supported, scope=external marking enforced, and project-scoped path evidence required for target-project facts. No assumptions presented as facts. Evidence agreement between agents is pass with zero conflicts. PRD readiness requirements met.
